meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Skills Setup to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no portfolio' hurdle by mastering Claude Code skills. A high-impact tutorial for founders to build, ship, and monetize faster using AI tools.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap kills SaaS momentum. You solve it by shipping functional, revenue-ready micro-apps using Claude Code and Antigravity. By automating the boilerplate and focusing on business logic, you can transform a single weekend into a production-grade portfolio piece that demonstrates technical authority and immediate market value.
content.intro:
The cold reality of the SaaS market is simple: nobody cares about your ideas, they care about your output. Founders often find themselves paralyzed by the 'no portfolio' trap—an invisible wall between having a vision and proving you can execute. When investors or customers look for proof, they aren't looking for lines of code; they are looking for functional assets that solve real problems.

Today, we shatter that barrier. By leveraging Claude Code’s autonomous engineering capabilities alongside Antigravity’s architectural scaffolding, you will move from zero to a live, monetizable MVP in hours. This isn't just about writing code; it's about building a digital footprint that screams 'competence' to the market.

steps.title: Define Your MVP Scope
steps.description: Before touching code, define a high-value, narrow-scope problem. A portfolio piece should solve one specific pain point perfectly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a CTO. Generate a lean, high-conversion SaaS MVP specification for a tool that solves [INSERT PAIN POINT]. Include a database schema and a feature roadmap.

steps.title: Bootstrap the Architecture
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the foundation of your project, ensuring best practices are baked in from line one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a production-ready Next.js project with Tailwind CSS, Supabase integration, and Stripe checkout flow.

steps.title: Implement Core Business Logic
steps.description: Focus on the unique value proposition. Let Claude Code handle the CRUD operations while you verify the business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the server-side logic for a subscription-gated API endpoint that processes user input and returns a high-value data insight.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Implement the user authentication flow and secure the API route using NextAuth.'

steps.title: Style for Conversion
steps.description: An MVP without a professional UI is invisible. Use AI to bridge the gap between functional and polished.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a high-converting landing page component using Tailwind CSS that emphasizes social proof and clear call-to-actions.

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: A portfolio piece is only real if it’s live. Automate the deployment process to get your MVP in front of users.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Vercel deployment configuration and a post-launch marketing checklist for this MVP.

pro_tips: Always define your 'Success Metric' in the first Claude Code prompt to keep the AI focused on business outcomes rather than just code completion.
Use Antigravity for architectural patterns; it prevents the 'spaghetti code' trap that plagues solo founder projects.
Treat your GitHub commits as your public resume; write descriptive, professional commit messages that explain the 'why' behind the logic.
Never let the AI write code you don't understand; use 'claude ask' to explain every complex function before merging.
Focus on building 'utility tools' rather than complex platforms—small, useful tools have a higher chance of going viral and creating portfolio value.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, share it on X and LinkedIn using a 'Build in Public' thread to immediately start gathering user feedback and potential leads.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect time to build. Your portfolio is a byproduct of your shipping speed. By integrating these AI tools into your daily workflow, you aren't just a founder—you're a high-velocity developer. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
